mapper.update: UPDATE iot_device_config SET sync_status=#{syncStatus}, sync_time=#{syncTime} WHERE device_code=#{deviceCode} AND sync_status=0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO iot_device_config (id, device_id, device_code, config_key, config_value, config_type, sync_status, sync_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{c.id}, #{c.deviceId}, #{c.deviceCode}, #{c.configKey}, #{c.configValue}, #{c.configType}, #{c.syncStatus}, #{c.syncTime}, #{c.createTime}, #{c.updateTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), config_type = VALUES(config_type), sync_status = VALUES(sync_status), sync_time = VALUES(sync_time), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
